items.definition_en: A takeoff ramp is the slope that jumpers launch from.
items.example_en: She carefully adjusted her speed before reaching the takeoff ramp.

items.definition_en: A jump suit is a special outfit worn by ski jumpers.
items.example_en: He zipped up his jump suit before the competition.

items.definition_en: A jumping hill is a structure used for jumping events.
items.example_en: The new jumping hill was built for international tournaments.

items.definition_en: The flight phase is the time when the jumper is in the air.
items.example_en: He maintained excellent posture during the flight phase.

items.definition_en: Hill size is the measurement of the length of a ski jumping hill.
items.example_en: They built a new hill size to host bigger events.

items.definition_en: The inrun is the slope where the jumper gains speed before taking off.
items.example_en: The inrun was covered with fresh snow this morning.

items.definition_en: A landing hill is where jumpers land after their leap.
items.example_en: He lost his balance on the landing hill but avoided a fall.

items.definition_en: A distance marker shows how far a jumper has traveled.
items.example_en: The distance marker indicated a new personal best.

items.definition_en: Wind compensation is a score adjustment due to wind conditions.
items.example_en: He earned extra points thanks to wind compensation.

items.definition_en: A telemark landing is a landing technique used in ski jumping.
items.example_en: Judges gave her high marks for a perfect telemark landing.

items.definition_en: A hill record is the farthest jump ever made on a hill.
items.example_en: He broke the hill record with his stunning leap.

items.definition_en: A gate is the start point on the inrun for jumpers.
items.example_en: The officials lowered the gate due to stronger wind.

items.definition_en: A jumping judge is an official who evaluates ski jump performance.
items.example_en: A jumping judge awarded high points for style.

items.definition_en: A preliminary round is the first stage of a competition.
items.example_en: She advanced quickly through the preliminary round.

items.definition_en: A ski binding is the device that attaches a ski jumper's boots to the skis.
items.example_en: He checked his ski binding before every jump.

items.definition_en: A wind sock is a tube that shows wind direction and strength.
items.example_en: The wind sock fluttered as a breeze passed over the hill.

items.definition_en: A jumping tower is the high structure from which skiers start their jump.
items.example_en: The new jumping tower offers a spectacular view of the valley.
